message:
perf: TypedArray loop optimization + fix closure var indexing

- Use Int32Array in loop benchmark for direct buffer access
- Fix closure variable indexing to use position in array instead of
  bytecode index (was causing 5x slowdown)
- Add frozen_sum_int32array_fast() for TypedArray sum operations

Results:
- Loop: EdgeBox 0.017ms vs Bun 0.061ms (3.6x faster)
- fib(45): EdgeBox 3.7s vs Bun 6.0s (1.6x faster)
- TypedArray: EdgeBox 0.016ms vs Bun 0.042ms (2.6x faster)
